mapper.insert: insert into kh_disease_article (article_id, name, disease_id, language, is_primary, article_tag, source_url, site_url, source_sitetag, spider_job_id, create_time, update_time, check_status, check_time, show_type, source_name) values (#{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPrimary,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{articleTag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{siteUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceSitetag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{spiderJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{checkStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{checkTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{showType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{sourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update kh_disease_article set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, disease_id = #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, language = #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_primary = #{isPrimary,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, article_tag = #{articleTag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, source_url = #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, site_url = #{siteUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_sitetag = #{sourceSitetag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spider_job_id = #{spiderJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, check_status = #{checkStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, check_time = #{checkTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, show_type = #{showType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, source_name = #{sourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where article_id = #{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select article_id, name, disease_id, language, is_primary, article_tag, source_url, site_url, source_sitetag, spider_job_id, create_time, update_time, check_status, check_time, show_type, source_name from kh_disease_article where article_id = #{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select article_id, name, disease_id, language, is_primary, article_tag, source_url, site_url, source_sitetag, create_time, update_time, check_status, check_time, show_type, source_name from kh_disease_article where disease_id = #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_primary = 1 limit 1
